content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: header_spoof_auth_bypass ⇒ Using(req.headers['x-user-id'])
P: strip_untrusted_header('x-user-id') → prefer(session_userId)
V: ensure(userId) ∧ test(header_spoofing)
R: ! Unauthorized_access ∧ ! Session_confusion
A: Review_authentication_strategy ∧ Limit_header_usage

[AUDIT]
Treat header_spoof_auth_bypass as a trust-boundary issue and apply strip_untrusted_header('x-user-id') before merge.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: user_id_source_change ⇒ using_req_headers_for_user_id
P: validate_user_id_presence → strict_header_validation
V: test_api_with_valid_invalid_user_ids ∧ check_access_control
R: ! header_spoofing ∧ ! user_impersonation ∧ ! session_fixation
A: Verify user_id is well-sanitized; restrict access based on valid users.

[AUDIT]
Treat user_id_source_change as a trust-boundary issue and apply validate_user_id_presence before merge.

a: Verify user_id is well-sanitized; restrict access based on valid users.
